_meta.note: Aha! is milestone SoT for TPMs. Engineers do not update Aha! directly — TPMs reconcile from Jira/Linear weekly.
_meta.simulation_note: Simulated state as of 2026-04-13. Baseline: 2026-03-11. Auth0 punted (T1), Model Serving descoped (T2), SHIELD mandate issued (T3), MERIDIAN mobile endpoints scoped (T4), PULSE FlowEngine unresolved (T5).

programs.name: NEXUS — Platform Re-architecture & Service Consolidation
programs.ragRationale: IAM M6 confirmed slipping to Aug 28 (Auth0 punt). Cascading to SHIELD (14 controls), HORIZON (GA slip), ATLAS (workaround debt). OTel and service retirement progressing but below plan.

milestones.name: OpenTelemetry migration — DataCore teams
milestones.ragNote: 4 holdout teams partially resolved after VP Eng OTel directive Apr 1. On track to close majority by Apr 30 but tail teams may slip.

milestones.name: First 60 services retired
milestones.ragNote: Undocumented dependencies continuing to surface. 18 services retired so far. Buffer consumed. May slip 2-3 weeks.

milestones.name: Unified CI/CD — all 15 teams
milestones.ragNote: Jenkins resistance from 4 DataCore leads softening after Yuki all-hands Apr 8. GHA migration tooling (F4) now at 65%.

milestones.name: IAM unified service live in prod
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from Jul 31. Auth0 contract decision punted by CISO Mar 18. Auth module (F1) blocked on contract. Cascades: SHIELD 14 controls, HORIZON GA, ATLAS workaround.

features.name: IAM service — Auth module
features.note: Blocked on Auth0 contract decision. Only peripheral scaffolding work proceeding.

programs.name: ATLAS — Enterprise NovaAI Launch
programs.ragRationale: SSO (M3) nearly complete — Apex Health demo Apr 2 succeeded. Audit logging (M4) slipped 3 weeks to May 21 (Model Serving descope). SLA gap (94.2%) still unresolved. Auth0 workaround entrenched.

milestones.name: SSO integration live (Okta, Azure AD)
milestones.ragNote: Apex Health Apr 2 demo succeeded with SSO in sandbox. M3 on pace to close by Apr 25.

milestones.name: Audit logging MVP
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from Apr 30 by 3 weeks. Model Serving descoped from 90% to 55% for SPARK — ATLAS audit logging team now running at sustainable pace but date moved.

milestones.name: SLA monitoring infra live
milestones.ragNote: Core Infra continued deprioritization. SLA at 94.2% — emergency fix still ongoing. Credibility risk for enterprise commitments.

milestones.name: First 5 enterprise GA customers
milestones.ragNote: Dependent on SSO (M3), audit logging (M4 slipped), SLA credibility (M6 behind).

features.name: Multi-tenant model serving
features.note: Auth0 workaround built in as interim solution. Technical debt accruing — estimated 3wk refactor effort when NEXUS IAM lands.

programs.name: SHIELD — SOC 2 Type II Certification
programs.ragRationale: 14 controls still blocked on NEXUS IAM (Auth0 punt confirmed Aug 28). Mandate-driven acceleration recovering trajectory — 48 controls complete vs 34. M3 shifted to Jun 1. August audit feasibility improving but not yet assured.

milestones.name: 70 controls complete
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from May 1 to Jun 1. Yuki mandate Mar 25 unblocked teams. Trajectory now 6-8 controls/week. 48 complete as of Apr 13. Recoverable to Jun if mandate holds and IAM-dependent controls handled on parallel path.

milestones.name: 100 controls complete
milestones.ragNote: 14 controls blocked on NEXUS IAM (now Aug 28). Unless parallel path found, 14 controls cannot complete before July deadline. Deloitte engagement at risk.

milestones.name: Audit evidence package to Deloitte
milestones.ragNote: Fatima started Vanta tagging. Evidence package for completed controls underway. IAM-blocked controls remain a gap.

milestones.name: SOC 2 Type II certification
milestones.ragNote: Board mandate. Deloitte audit date fixed. IAM blocker requires resolution path by Jun 1 or August certification is at extreme risk.

controlStatus.changeNote: 14 new controls completed since Mar 11 (mandate effect). MERIDIAN M1 completed Apr 3 — unblocked 8 previously blocked controls, now in progress. All controls now have assigned owners (mandate resolved 'no owner' gap).

programs.name: MERIDIAN — API Consolidation & v1 Deprecation
programs.ragRationale: M1 completed Apr 3 (2-week slip from mobile endpoint scope-in, now resolved). Python SDK v2 on track for Apr 30 GA. Enterprise migration accelerating. SMB migration still unresourced — structural risk to Sep EoL.

milestones.name: v2 API feature parity
milestones.ragNote: Completed Apr 3 including 3 mobile push notification endpoints (scoped in Mar 13). 2-week slip from Mar 20 original date.

milestones.name: Migration tooling + guides live
milestones.ragNote: Slipped from Apr 1 to Apr 18. Enterprise migration guides in final review. On track for Apr 18.

milestones.name: Enterprise customers 100% on v2
milestones.ragNote: 5 of 13 enterprise v1 customers migrated since Mar 11. Tooling improving. Achievable by Jun if pace holds.

milestones.name: Mid-market customers 100% on v2
milestones.ragNote: 128 customers on v1 mid-market. Self-migration rate low. No dedicated support team. Resourcing decision still pending from Ingrid S.

milestones.name: v1 API EoL + infrastructure shutdown
milestones.ragNote: Legal commitment. SMB (453 customers) unresourced for migration. No slip room on EoL date.

programs.name: PULSE — Data Pipeline Overhaul (Airflow → Temporal)
programs.ragRationale: DataCore recovering strongly after schema drift resolved (47% → 71%). FlowEngine stuck at 44% — Amara decision on SDK vs migration expected Apr 15. NovaAI runbooks in progress. Dual-run cost accruing ($380K/mo × 5 weeks = $475K since baseline).

milestones.name: DataCore pipelines 100% migrated
milestones.ragNote: Schema drift (PULSE-189) resolved Mar 21 — significant velocity recovery. 127 of 180 pipelines migrated. 22 previously blocked are now migrating. Tight but achievable by May 1.

milestones.name: FlowEngine pipelines 100% migrated
milestones.ragNote: Amara decision on SDK vs migration pending Apr 15. If SDK wins: M4 slips to Aug 12. If migration prioritized: Jul 1 feasible with acceleration.

milestones.name: NovaAI training pipelines migrated
milestones.ragNote: Runbook creation 55% complete — blocker clearing by Apr 25. Migration will accelerate in May.

milestones.name: Airflow decommission
milestones.ragNote: Dual-run cost $380K/month. 5 weeks elapsed since baseline = $475K accrued. If FlowEngine slips to Aug 12, decommission moves to Sep — $380K additional overrun.

datacore.changeNote: Schema drift resolved Mar 21. 43 additional pipelines migrated.

flowengine.changeNote: Minimal progress. SDK launch competing for team bandwidth.

novaai.changeNote: Runbook creation underway. 11 pipelines migrated since Mar 11.

programs.name: HORIZON — Mobile Platform (iOS & Android)
programs.ragRationale: Auth0 punt confirmed: NEXUS IAM now Aug 28, HORIZON needs IAM by Jun. GA slipping Jul 31 → Aug 31 minimum. Kestrel ($1.6M deal) budget cycle closes if slip hits Aug. MERIDIAN mobile endpoints resolved — M3 tracking Apr 18.

milestones.name: Backend API contracts finalized
milestones.ragNote: MERIDIAN-4 (mobile push endpoints) completed Apr 3. API contract negotiations 65% complete. Targeting Apr 18. MERIDIAN tooling (M4) completion required before final sign-off.

milestones.name: Beta — 10 enterprise customers
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from Jun 15. Auth0 punt confirmed — IAM needed Jun, NEXUS delivers Aug 28. Beta cannot proceed without mobile SSO.

milestones.name: App Store / Play Store submission
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from Jun 20. 2-3 week App Store review — Aug 20 submission targets Aug 31 GA minimum.

milestones.name: GA launch
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from Jul 31. Auth0 cascade confirmed. Kestrel deal (budget cycle Jul) and Solaris deal (Palantir eval) both at heightened risk.

programs.name: SPARK — NovaAI v2 Core Platform
programs.ragRationale: M1 architecture review completed Mar 24 (Karl-facilitated). Now in Execution. Model Serving descoped 90% → 55% — M2 slips Jun 30 → Aug 11. Vector Store v2 (M4) ahead of plan at 74%.

milestones.name: Architecture design review
milestones.ragNote: Completed Mar 24. Karl Bergstrom facilitated Mar 17 session; Leo approved revised architecture Mar 24. vLLM chosen for model serving layer.

milestones.name: New model serving alpha
milestones.ragNote: SLIPPED from Jun 30 by 6 weeks. Model Serving team descoped from 90% to 55% commitment. Alpha development started Apr 1 but at reduced velocity.

milestones.name: Visual workflow builder beta
milestones.ragNote: Can begin once M2 architecture patterns are established. Not at risk yet.

milestones.name: Vector Store v2 with enterprise isolation
milestones.ragNote: Embeddings team independent of Model Serving bottleneck. Ahead of plan.

milestones.name: NovaAI v2 platform GA
milestones.ragNote: M2 slip to Aug 11 puts downstream M3/M5 under pressure. GA target Dec 31 — still achievable if M2 holds Aug.
